name: clinic office managers processing 10-20 patient records/month tool
description: For clinic office managers processing 10-20 patient records/month, inefficient aggregation causes delays in patient care. We provide a streamlined service instead of manual record keeping and disparate systems.
target_audience: clinic office managers processing 10-20 patient records/month
problem_solved: Inefficient aggregation of patient medical history
features: manual data entry for patient records
simple dashboard for viewing aggregated history
